title: Resource  Armadillo
description: The way to generate valuable resources. Get an Armadillo and transform it into anything you want.
body:
![Resource  Armadillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6902242fd98b2882b8eb798011e780e2718c7ce5.png)

![Resource  Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b026ece906aa9934d51925091f622e85f270abee.png)
## 
### **The way to generate valuable items**
![Resource](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d63acb92761688f00096733ad6b6047b78b3312.png)


## Features
- Tons of Resources like Diamond, Emerald, Dye, Clay and more
- Mod Compatibility
- Transforming Armadillos to the Resources you want
- Breeding Armadillos
- Harvisting Scutes


![Resource Roost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/761be84bb23d1310cc917585f1a3e318a1f45a0d_0.webp)

Roost
The Roost is used to transform a normal Armadillo into a Resource Armadillo. If you want to create a Diamond Armadillo, you will need:

1 diamond
1 iron scute
Furnace fuel
A regular Armadillo
Once you have all the materials, the Roost will transform the Armadillo into its resource variant. You can view all recipes in JEI or EMI.

 

Armadillo Hive
The Armadillo Hive is used to breed Resource Armadillos of the same type. For example:

Two Diamond Armadillos → Baby Diamond Armadillo
Special recipes like the Netherite Armadillo: A Gold Armadillo and an Obsidian Armadillo will produce a Baby Netherite Armadillo.
However, breeding will only occur if the hive contains at least two Armadillo food items like Spider Eyes.

 

Nest
The Nest acts as a storage unit for Armadillos and has the following features:

It picks up Armadillos just like other containers.
If the Nest contains a brush (of any kind), it will automatically brush the Armadillos and collect their scutes if they have any left.
 

Centrifuge
The Centrifuge is used to convert scutes into essence. It works in two ways:

Manually inserting an item will add one to all slots.
Using a hopper will fill an entire stack in one slot (up to 64 items).
